name: Entra ID Active Accounts Without Employee Record
description: Detects active Entra ID accounts whose email does not match any employee record.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.mail AS email FROM entra_users u LEFT JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.mail, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.mail), '') != '' AND e.work_email IS NULL
remediation: Review unmatched accounts, classify approved non-employee identities, and disable unknown access.
